summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of scrolling fixes, z-index management, and nav bar hiding on /minted-photos Card View. All user-reported issues have been verified as FIXED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All scrolling and z-index fixes verified working. Nav bar correctly hides when card is flipped and returns when unflipped.

touch_scrolling_on_cards.details: touch-action: pan-y applied to body, html, and grid container. CSS rules in index.css ensure scrolling works when finger is on card images. Images have pointer-events: none.

flipped_card_z_index_100.details: When card is flipped, parent container gets z-index: 100 (verified via JS evaluation). Other cards have z-index: auto or 1. Flipped card appears ABOVE all other cards.

backdrop_overlay.details: Dark overlay (bg-black/60 = rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) appears with z-index: 40 when card is flipped. Clicking backdrop dismisses the flipped card.

other_cards_dimmed.details: 11 out of 12 cards dimmed (opacity-30, pointer-events-none) when one card is flipped. Only the flipped card remains fully visible.

nav_bar_hidden_when_flipped.details: BottomNav component is completely removed from DOM when card is flipped (via React conditional render: {!hideNav && <BottomNav />}). NavContext.setHideNav(true) called when flippedCardId is set.

nav_bar_returns_after_unflip.details: BottomNav returns to DOM after clicking 'Tap to flip back' button or backdrop. NavContext.setHideNav(false) called when flippedCardId is cleared.

card_layout_order.details: Card front layout order: 1) Photo Image (top), 2) Name, 3) Dollar Value & Stars, 4) Scenery & Level, 5) Stamina, 6) Streaks (if any), 7) 'Tap to flip' button at bottom

flipped_card_back_content.details: All stats present on flipped card back: Base Value, XP bar with percentage, Total Dollar Value (Core Power), Authenticity (Face Detection + Selfie Match), Photo Stats & Bonuses section with Stars, Level, Age, Reactions, BL Coins, Seniority

test_screenshots: 05_card_flipped.png - Card flipped showing back with all stats
mobile_login_02_minted.png - Mobile view with bottom nav visible
mobile_login_04_flipped.png - Mobile view with nav hidden when card flipped

user_reported_issues_status.page_scrolling_blocked_by_cards: FIXED - touch-action: pan-y applied, images have pointer-events: none
user_reported_issues_status.flipped_card_hidden_behind_others: FIXED - z-index: 100 applied to flipped card, other cards dimmed
user_reported_issues_status.nav_bar_should_hide_when_flipped: FIXED - NavContext correctly hides BottomNav when flippedCardId is set
